headline: The Energy ETF NDIV paid 44% returns this year, but dividends may not last
summary: Amplify Energy & Natural Resources Covered Call ETF (NYSEARCA:NDIV) targets 10% or greater total annualized income by pairing high-dividend energy and natural resource stocks with covered call option premiums. That dual-income pitch draws investors who want commodity-sector exposure without sacrificing yield. Whether that income stream is durable is a different question. Two Income Streams, One ... The Energy ETF NDIV paid 44% returns this year, but dividends may not last
